arts.ttl: Liverpool refusal will leave Arne Slot delighted after very different Boxing Day repeat
arts.sum: LIVERPOOL 3-1 LEICESTER CITY: After suffering an early sucker punch at a foggy Anfield on Thursday night, Arne Slot's Premier League leaders hit back and extended their lead at the top of the table

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp might not have liked Anfield chant but Arne Slot has given Liverpool reason to believe
arts.sum: Ian Doyle looks at a major talking point after Liverpool extended their Premier League lead with a 3-1 win against Leicester City at Anfield

arts.ttl: Mo Salah dreaming of ‘special’ Premier League title following landmark Liverpool goal
arts.sum: Mo Salah says winning the Premier League title this season is “something I dream of” as Liverpool pulled clear at the top of the table. Leicester City took the lead at Anfield on Boxing Day, but Cody Gakpo, Curtis Jones and the Egyptian winger found the net to complete a comeback victory for the Reds. […] The post Mo Salah dreaming of ‘special’ Premier League title following landmark Liverpool goal first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Leicester player ratings v Liverpool as Stolarczyk stands tall in valiant defeat
arts.sum: It looked like City might be halfway to a victory, but in added time at the end of the first period, Gakpo cut inside James Justin and curled a brilliant effort into the far corner from 20 yards. But while City defended heroically at times, the in-form table-toppers’ dominance eventually paid off, with Cody Gakpo striking on half-time, and then Curtis Jones and Mo Salah netting in the second period.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah hits new Premier League goalscoring milestone as Liverpool fight back against Leicester
arts.sum: Liverpool winger Mohamed Salah registers his 100th home goal in the Premier League as the Reds fight back to defeat Leicester City 3-1 at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot dealt Liverpool selection problem after Dominik Szoboszlai suspension
arts.sum: Dominik Szoboszlai will miss Liverpool's next Premier League game against West Ham

arts.ttl: Liverpool punish rivals’ errors with dominant win over Leicester to stretch lead
arts.sum: Cody Gakpo, Curtis Jones and Mohamed Salah scored in a 3-1 win at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Liverpool next five fixtures compared to Chelsea and Arsenal after Leicester win
arts.sum: Liverpool are top of the Premier League after beating Leicester 3-1 on Boxing Day

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Arne Slot receive blessing in disguise as 24-year-old suspended for West Ham game
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Dominik Szoboszlai will miss Sunday's Premier League clash with West Ham United after picking up a yellow card against Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Premier League issue TWO statements as Liverpool fans boo three-minute VAR delay
arts.sum: Liverpool's clash with Leicester saw two lengthy VAR delays in the second half as a goal for Curtis Jones was given, and one for Cody Gakpo was disallowed
